creator: kjozic@gmail.com
text:
Hello Torsten,

4.3.2 builds were OK, but problems started with 4.3.2_1 builds. The patch for 4.3.3 has been tested on my machine (14.1-RELEASE, amd64) and was OK.

Wasmer was problematic since the first commit. I don't use it anymore, but I have kept submitting patches. I am willing to write instructions if someone wants to continue to maintain wasmer.



With best regards,
    Krešimir
